title: Getting Started
description: The Pinelabs Common SDK lets an Android merchant application drive a Pine Labs POS terminal via app-to-app integration with the on-device MasterApp (com.pinelabs.masterapp). The SDK abstracts the IPC (Messenger + JSON payload) and exposes a small, strongly-typed Kotlin surface.

sections.heading: Minimum end-to-end flow
steps: Call `init` once per process with merchant identity and timeout.
Build a `TransactionRequest` with amount, billingRefNo, invoiceNo, and transactionType.

sections.heading: Installation
Runtime prerequisites
items: MasterApp must be installed on the terminal with its service `com.pinelabs.masterapp.SERVER` exported.
The terminal batch must not be locked. Settle before starting new transactions if it is.

sections.heading: Conventions
items: **Amounts** are always in the smallest currency unit (paise for INR). `9900` = ₹99.00.
**eventId** is a UUIDv4 string generated by the SDK on each `doTransaction`. Callers never supply one.
**Thread model**: listener callbacks run on the SDK worker thread (`pinelabs-sdk-worker`). Marshal to the main thread for UI work.
**Concurrency**: only one transaction is in flight per SDK instance; calls are serialized.
